name: I-Epinephrine (Adrenaline)
description: I-catecholamine engapheliyo kunye nomsebenzi we-alpha kunye ne-beta adrenergic. Unyango lokuqala lwe-anaphylaxis kunye nokubanjwa kwentliziyo. Kwi-anaphylaxis, ithanga le-IM likhethwa ngaphezu kwe-IV (ikhuselekile, i-equivancy efficacy). Musa ukulibazisa ukufikelela kwe-IV kwi-anaphylaxis.
dose: I-Anaphylaxis: 0.3-0.5 mg IM (ithanga le-anterolateral) | Auto-injector 0.3 mg IM. Phinda u-q5-15 min PRN. Ukubanjwa kwenhliziyo: 1 mg IV / IO q3-5 min ngexesha leCPR. I-bronchospasm enzima: 0.3 mg IM.
window: Kwi-anaphylaxis: nika i-IM ngokukhawuleza -- ungalibazisi ukufikelela kwi-IV.
contraindications: Akukho contraindications ngokupheleleyo kwimeko kaxakeka ubomi esichengeni
warnings: I-epinephrine ye-IV ye-anaphylaxis kufuneka isetyenziswe kuphela ekubanjweni kwentliziyo okanye umothuko omkhulu-iyingozi ukuba inikwe i-IV push kwisigulane esiyaziyo.
Ukugqithisa kubangela i-tissue necrosis -- qinisekisa i-IV patency.
Yandisa imfuno yeoksijini ye-myocardial --sebenzisa isilumkiso kwisifo se-coronary eyaziwayo ngaphandle kokubanjwa.

pediatric.dose: I-Anaphylaxis: 0.01 mg / kg IM (ubuninzi be-0.5 mg). I-EpiPen Jr (0.15 mg) ye-15-30 kg. Ukubanjwa kwentliziyo: 0.01 mg / kg IV / IO q3-5 min.
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa idosi esekelwe kubunzima. Broselow tape reference iyacetyiswa.

obstetric.note: Sebenzisa idosi eqhelekileyo ye-anaphylaxis -- ukusinda komama kubaluleke kakhulu. I-Epinephrine ikhuselekile ekukhulelweni kwiimeko ezisongela ubomi.
